description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of peep toe sandals from enroute. Pair it with any kind of western and ethnic wear, and look great both ways.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.Heel: 2"UpperLeather upper with perforations for absolute breathable comfortErgonomically curved leather footbed for enhanced comfortLeather bow on the toes for styleOutsoleDurable TPU outsole with a grooved forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
